Home Make a Submission?

Mandarin Jello Salads

Mary Germick

Prep time -

Cook time -

Yield: 8 servings

Ingredients

  • 2 large cans Mandarin Oranges, drained for 6 hours
  • 16 oz. Cottage Cheese
  • 3 oz. box Orange Jello
  • 8 oz. Cool Whip

Directions

Mix together cottage cheese & box of jello. Add drained oranges. Fold in the cool whip.

This is best if made the night before.
